Short Description: Seasoned Ground Beef with a Smoky Special Burger Sauce and Caramelized Onions, Apple Cider Cabbage Slaw, and Roasted Sweet Potato Wedges
Long Description: Seasoned ground beef finished with a smoky special burger sauce, served with caramelized onions, a crisp apple cider cabbage slaw, and roasted sweet potato wedges for a bold, craveable plate with a nostalgic, American finish.

Short Description: Miso Garlic Chicken with a White Miso Glaze and Charred Broccoli and Roasted Mushrooms over Jasmine Rice
Long Description: Tender miso garlic chicken finished with a savory white miso glaze, served with charred broccoli and roasted mushrooms over jasmine rice for a rich, umami forward plate with a warm, savory finish.

Short Description: Blackened Chicken Breast over a Basil Pesto Hummus with Charred Broccoli and Pickled Red Onions, Roasted Baby Potatoes
Long Description: Seasoned blackened chicken breast layered over a creamy basil pesto hummus, served with charred broccoli, pickled red onions, and roasted baby potatoes for a fresh, herbaceous plate with a bright, Mediterranean finish.

Short Description: Rosemary Garlic Steak with a Red Wine Reduction and Roasted Mushrooms and Pickled Red Onions over Toasted Brown Rice
Long Description: Rosemary garlic marinated steak finished with a rich red wine reduction, served with roasted mushrooms and pickled red onions over toasted brown rice for a savory, deeply flavored plate with a refined, steakhouse finish.

Short Description: Seared Salmon with a Blood Orange Glaze and Roasted Beets over Roasted Sweet Potatoes
Long Description: Seared salmon finished with a bright blood orange glaze, served with roasted beets over roasted sweet potatoes for a light, citrus forward plate with a vibrant, refreshing finish.

Short Description: Seven Spice Shrimp with a Smoky Chipotle Sauce and Charred Corn and Charred Bell Peppers over Cilantro Lime Rice
Long Description: Seven spice shrimp topped with a smoky chipotle sauce, served with charred corn and charred bell peppers over cilantro lime rice for a smoky, spice forward plate with a bright, Latin finish.

Short Description: Blackened Chicken Breast over Luxurious Shell Pasta with a Dairy-Free Vodka Cream Sauce and Fresh Basil
Long Description: Tender blackened chicken breast layered over luxurious shell pasta and finished with a silky dairy-free vodka cream sauce made from San Marzano tomatoes and coconut milk, topped with fresh basil for a rich, indulgent plate with a bright, classic Italian-American finish.

Short Description: Crispy Buffalo Cauliflower and Crispy Tofu with a Tangy Buffalo Glaze and Roasted Rainbow Carrots over Herbed Quinoa
Long Description: Crispy buffalo cauliflower and crispy tofu finished with a tangy buffalo glaze, served with roasted rainbow carrots over herbed quinoa for a bold, comforting plate with a vibrant, plant forward finish.

Short Description: Our classic high protein and collagen rich chicken bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours
Long Description: Our classic chicken bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours with fresh herbs and spices.

Short Description: Vanilla chia pudding with fresh blackberries and blueberries
Long Description: A creamy vanilla chia pudding sweetened with maple syrup and topped with fresh blackberries and blueberries.
